title: Software Factory 3.0 Orchestrator State
description: Schema for orchestrator-state-v3.json - tracks state machine progression and project iteration containers

state_machine.description: State machine progression tracking - current state, transition history, and validation status

current_state.description: Current state in the Software Factory 3.0 state machine

state_history.description: Ordered history of state transitions with timestamps and reasons

validated_by.description: State Manager agent that validated this transition (MUST be 'state-manager' for SF 3.0 compliance)

orchestrator_proposal.description: State that orchestrator proposed during SHUTDOWN_CONSULTATION (added by State Manager when orchestrator makes proposal)

proposal_accepted.description: Whether State Manager accepted orchestrator's proposal (true = accepted, false = rejected/overridden). Required when orchestrator_proposal is present.

proposal_rejected_reason.description: Explanation why State Manager rejected/overrode orchestrator's proposal (e.g., 'Cannot return to INIT - must continue mandatory sequence project_initialization'). Required when proposal_accepted is false.

mandatory_sequence.description: Name of mandatory sequence this transition belongs to (e.g., 'project_initialization')

sequence_position.description: Position in mandatory sequence (e.g., '6/9' means step 6 of 9)

guards_evaluated.description: Guard conditions that were evaluated for this transition

last_transition_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent state transition

transition_validated.description: Whether current state transition was validated by State Manager

status.description: Status of state machine execution (PAUSED when sub-state machine active)

sub_state_machine.description: Sub-state machine status (e.g., fix cascade) when active

active.description: Whether a sub-state machine is currently active

state_file.description: Path to sub-state machine state file

return_state.description: State to return to when sub-state machine completes

loop_detection.description: Loop detection counters for preventing infinite state transition cycles (R530)

last_two_states.description: Ring buffer of last 2 states for ping-pong detection (A->B->A->B pattern)

ping_pong_count.description: Counter for 2-state ping-pong loops (A->B->A->B). Threshold: 5 repetitions = ERROR_RECOVERY

same_state_count.description: Counter for stuck-in-same-state loops (A->A->A). Threshold: 3 repetitions = ERROR_RECOVERY

error_recovery_entries.description: Count of ERROR_RECOVERY state entries from different states. Threshold: 3 entries = ESCALATE to ERROR_RECOVERY

last_progress_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last genuine progress detection (resets all counters)

project_progression.description: Project progression tracking through iteration containers (project/phase/wave hierarchy)

iteration.description: Current iteration number for project-level integration

backport_attempts_this_iteration.description: Counter for backport fix cycles within the current iteration (per R532 - prevents infinite loops)

max_backport_attempts_per_iteration.description: Maximum backport attempts allowed within single iteration before escalation to ERROR_RECOVERY (per R532)

iteration.description: Current iteration number for phase-level integration

backport_attempts_this_iteration.description: Counter for backport fix cycles within the current iteration (per R532 - prevents infinite loops)

max_backport_attempts_per_iteration.description: Maximum backport attempts allowed within single iteration before escalation to ERROR_RECOVERY (per R532)

total_waves_in_phase.description: Total number of waves planned for this phase - CRITICAL for state machine guard evaluation at COMPLETE_WAVE to determine if more waves exist or if all waves are complete

waves_completed.description: Number of waves completed in this phase - used with total_waves_in_phase for guard evaluation

bugs.description: Bug tracking for progress-based iteration limits (R615, R616)

total_found.description: Total bugs discovered across all iterations

total_closed.description: Total bugs fixed across all iterations

reopened_count.description: Total bugs that have been reopened (flapping)

history.description: Bug counts per iteration for progress analysis

progress_stalls.description: Consecutive iterations with no progress (R615 no-progress counter)

max_stalls_allowed.description: Maximum stalls before ERROR_RECOVERY (R615 no-progress limit)

current_iteration.description: Current iteration number for this scope

wave_number.description: Wave number within current phase (1, 2, 3, etc.)

iteration.description: Current iteration number for wave-level integration

backport_attempts_this_iteration.description: Counter for backport fix cycles within the current iteration (per R532 - prevents infinite loops)

max_backport_attempts_per_iteration.description: Maximum backport attempts allowed within single iteration before escalation to ERROR_RECOVERY (per R532)

efforts_completed.description: List of completed effort identifiers in this wave

bugs.description: Bug tracking for progress-based iteration limits (R615, R616)

total_found.description: Total bugs discovered across all iterations

total_closed.description: Total bugs fixed across all iterations

reopened_count.description: Total bugs that have been reopened (flapping)

history.description: Bug counts per iteration for progress analysis

progress_stalls.description: Consecutive iterations with no progress (R615 no-progress counter)

max_stalls_allowed.description: Maximum stalls before ERROR_RECOVERY (R615 no-progress limit)

current_iteration.description: Current iteration number for this scope

iteration_tracking.description: Metadata about iteration containers and convergence

active_container_level.description: Which integration level is currently active

active_container_id.description: Identifier of the active integration container (matches entry in integration-containers.json)

references.description: References to other state files in SF 3.0 separated state architecture

bug_tracking_file.description: Path to bug tracking state file

integration_containers_file.description: Path to integration containers state file

fix_cascade_state_file.description: Path to fix cascade state file (only exists when cascade is active)

state_machine_definition.description: Path to state machine JSON definition file

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the orchestrator state file

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when state file was created

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when state file was last updated

last_updated_by.description: Agent that last updated this state file

planning_files.description: Tracking of all planning document locations per R550 - enables instant discovery without filesystem searching

test_plan.description: Path to project test plan (e.g., planning/project/PROJECT-TEST-PLAN.md)

phases.description: Phase-level planning files keyed by phase identifier (e.g., phase1, phase2)

^phase[0-9]+$.description: Planning files for a specific phase

test_plan.description: Path to phase test plan (e.g., planning/phase1/PHASE-TEST-PLAN.md)

waves.description: Wave-level planning files keyed by wave identifier (e.g., wave1, wave2)

^wave[0-9]+$.description: Planning files for a specific wave

architecture_plan.description: Path to wave architecture plan per R550 (e.g., planning/phase1/wave1/WAVE-ARCHITECTURE-PLAN.md). Created by architect during WAVE_ARCHITECTURE_PLANNING state.

test_plan.description: Path to wave test plan (e.g., planning/phase1/wave1/WAVE-TEST-PLAN.md)

efforts.description: Effort-level planning files keyed by effort identifier

additionalProperties.description: Planning files for a specific effort

split_plan.description: Path to effort split plan if effort was split (e.g., planning/phase1/wave1/effort-1.1.1-gitea-client-SPLIT-PLAN.md)

active_agents.description: List of currently active agent instances

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for this agent instance

artifacts.description: Tracks locations of all artifacts created during factory execution for instant discovery without filesystem searching (R340)

fix_plans.description: Fix plans created by Code-Reviewer during CREATE_FIX_PLAN state

file_path.description: Absolute or relative path to artifact file from project root

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when artifact was created

code_reviews.description: Code review reports created by Code-Reviewer during PERFORM_CODE_REVIEW state

split_plans.description: Split plans created by Code-Reviewer during CREATE_SPLIT_PLAN state

integration_reports.description: Integration reports created by Orchestrator during integration states

architecture_reviews.description: Architecture reviews created by Architect during architecture review states

pre_planned_infrastructure.description: Pre-planned infrastructure per R504 - ALL paths, branches, and remotes calculated and validated during planning phases. Infrastructure creation becomes mechanical execution of this validated plan.

then.errorMessage: R504 VIOLATION: validated=true requires efforts to be populated (pre-planned infrastructure must have at least one effort)

validated.description: Whether this infrastructure plan has been validated against all rules (R313, R327, R504)

validation_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when infrastructure was validated (null before validation)

project_prefix.description: Project prefix used for all branch names (from target-repo-config.yaml or PROJECT-IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md)

target_repo_url.description: Target repository URL where all branches will be pushed

efforts.description: Map of effort_id to effort infrastructure specifications

index.description: Numeric index of effort within wave (1, 2, 3, etc.)

branch_name.description: Fully-qualified branch name for this effort (R327 compliant)

base_branch.description: Branch this effort is based on (main, integration branch, or previous effort in cascade)

target_remote.description: Name of remote pointing to target repository (e.g., origin, target)

target_repo_url.description: Target repository URL for this effort (must match parent pre_planned_infrastructure.target_repo_url)

planning_remote.description: Name of remote pointing to planning repository

integration_branch.description: Wave integration branch this effort will be merged into

full_path.description: Absolute or relative path to effort working directory (R313 compliant)

estimated_lines.description: Estimated lines of code for this effort from planning phase

dependencies.description: List of effort IDs this effort depends on (empty array if no dependencies)

created.description: Whether this effort infrastructure has been physically created

validated.description: Whether this effort infrastructure has been validated per R509

validation_failure_reason.description: Reason for validation failure if validated=false, null otherwise (optional - only present if validation fails)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when effort infrastructure was created (optional - only present after creation)

cascade_reason.description: Explanation of why this base_branch was chosen (R308/R501 compliance)

split_pattern.description: Branch naming pattern for splits of this effort (e.g., effort-name--split-NNN)

splits.description: List of split branch names if effort was split

base_branch.description: Base branch for this integration (usually main or previous wave integration)

component_efforts.description: List of effort IDs that will be integrated into this branch

created.description: Whether this integration branch has been created

validated.description: Whether this integration infrastructure has been validated

base_branch.description: Base branch for phase integration (usually last wave integration of phase)

component_waves.description: List of wave integration IDs that will be integrated into this branch

created.description: Whether this integration branch has been created

validated.description: Whether this integration infrastructure has been validated

cascade_bases.description: Pre-calculated cascade base branches per R308/R501 - determines dependency order and base branches for all efforts

base_branch.description: The branch this effort cascades from

reason.description: Explanation of cascade logic (first effort, cascaded from X, etc.)

calculated_at.description: When this cascade base was calculated

bugs.description: Bug tracking for progress-based iteration limits (R615, R616)

total_found.description: Total bugs discovered across all iterations

total_closed.description: Total bugs fixed across all iterations

reopened_count.description: Total bugs that have been reopened (flapping)

history.description: Bug counts per iteration for progress analysis

progress_stalls.description: Consecutive iterations with no progress (R615 no-progress counter)

max_stalls_allowed.description: Maximum stalls before ERROR_RECOVERY (R615 no-progress limit)

current_iteration.description: Current iteration number for this scope
